data.title: Inceptio Technology Achieves ASPICE CL2 Certification, Strengthening Global R&D Platform and Readiness for International Collaboration
data.description: In Shanghai on April 13, 2026, Inceptio Technology, a prominent developer of autonomous driving technologies for trucks, attained Automotive SPICE Capability Level 2 (ASPICE CL2) certification, signifying a significant advancement in its expanding range of innovations.

data.title: Peli BioThermal Highlights Next-Generation Cold Chain Innovations at LogiPharma Europe 2026
data.description: Peli BioThermal, a leading company in temperature-controlled packaging, is set to unveil its newest advancements and key product range at LogiPharma Europe 2026 in Vienna on April 13. The event aims to address the industry's increasing need for enhanced dependability, with attendance expected to include numerous key players from the sector.

data.title: Kodamai Solves Enterprise AI’s Hardest Problem: Making Autonomous Agents Provably Correct at Scale
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia and Glasgow, Scotland, Kodamai has achieved a significant breakthrough in Enterprise AI. The company has successfully addressed the most challenging issue in the field - ensuring autonomous agents are provably correct on a large scale. This achievement marks a milestone in AI development and represents a major step forward for the industry.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp M&T Bank Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 15, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting the Buffalo, New York-based company will post earnings of $4.00 per share for the quarter, a significant increase from $3.32 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for M&T Bank's quarterly revenue stands at $2.42 billion, compared to $2.31 billion reported in the previous year. Additionally, the bank revealed a $5 billion buyback plan on March 30. Following this news, M&T Bank's shares closed at $219.92 on Friday, down 1.4%. For more detailed analyst ratings and information, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website. Explore insights from Benzinga's top analysts on the company's performance and outlook.

data.title: AI's Language Gap Is Closing - But Performance Shifts Between Model Releases, Warns RWS's TrainAI Study
data.description: RWS, an AI solutions company headquartered in Maidenhead, England, released results from their TrainAI Multilingual LLM Synthetic Data Generation Study. The study highlighted that top large language models (LLMs) are narrowing the global language disparity, but their consistency in performance across model generations can be uncertain. This emphasizes the importance of ongoing expert assessment to help businesses choose the most suitable model. RWS's findings indicate a need for vigilant evaluation to navigate through the evolving landscape of AI technologies, ensuring optimal selection for individual enterprises.

data.title: Infobip at 20: the AI Era Is Here, and the Next 20 Years Start Now
data.description: Celebrating its 20th anniversary, Infobip, based in Vodnjan, Croatia, has entered a crucial phase in its evolution. The company is transitioning its agentic AI technology from the pilot phase to production, signaling a major milestone.

data.title: Neat and Visa Partner to Modernize Card Insurance and Assistance in Europe
data.description: In Paris, Neat, a prominent InsurTech company in Europe specializing in embedded insurance, and Visa, a global leader in digital payments, have unveiled a strategic partnership.

Additionally, the stock market experienced a 2% increase, reaching an all-time high. Experts predict this growth trend will continue in the coming months.

data.title: SOFTSWISS Wins Global Tech Award for CyberTech Innovation with Pipeguard
data.description: In GŻIRA, Malta on April 13, 2026, SOFTSWISS, a leading iGaming software provider, emerged victorious with a Global Tech Award for 2026 in the Cyber Security Technology sector. The prestigious award highlights their innovative Pipeguard security platform, specifically designed to integrate seamlessly within the software development pipeline.

data.title: Over a third of Americans would accept twice as many ads for cheaper streaming
data.description: Recent data from Bango reveals that viewers are willing to accept additional advertisements in exchange for reduced subscription fees. The findings indicate that a significant portion of consumers prioritize cost-efficiency, with approximately 60% of participants expressing willingness to endure more ads for a decreased subscription price. This data underscores a shifting trend in consumer preferences, highlighting the increasing importance of affordability in the digital content landscape.
